alerts.title: Izmjene na noćnim tramvajskim linijama
alerts.summary: Due to temporary changes, night line 31 will be operated by buses instead of trams from Monday, March 2nd until Monday, March 9th.

alerts.title: Izmjene na zadnjim polascima linija 6 i 7
alerts.summary: Due to earlier start of works at Zapruđe depot, tram lines 6 and 7 will operate on altered routes during the nights of March 2nd to March 7th, 2026. The final departures will be rerouted via Savska cesta and Glavni kolodvor for line 6, and via Savska cesta, Ulica grada Vukovara, and Autobusni kolodvor for line 7.

alerts.title: Linije 224 i 283 voze obilazno prema Dupcu
alerts.summary: Due to roadworks, lines 224 and 283 will operate with a detour towards Dupac between 9 AM and 2 PM.

alerts.title: Linija 149 prometuje redovnom trasom
alerts.summary: Bus line 149 will resume its regular route from Kuniščak to Vrhovec. The temporary bus line 152 (Vidovčica - Vrhovec) will be cancelled as a result.

alerts.title: Linija 107 odsad prometuje i nedjeljom
alerts.summary: Bus line 107 (Jankomir - Žitnjak) will operate on Sundays and holidays with an increased number of departures on Saturdays. The bus stop 'Vjesnik' towards the east has been moved.

alerts.title: Izmješteno stajalište „Tomislavova“
alerts.summary: Due to construction at the Tomislavova bus stop on Zagrebačka cesta towards Črnomerec, buses on line 134 will temporarily stop 50 meters south.

alerts.title: Linije 6, 8 i 14 mijenjaju trase prometovanja
alerts.summary: Due to works at the Zapruđe loop, tram lines 6 and 8 will extend their routes, while line 14 will operate on a shortened route.

alerts.title: Izmještanje stajališta na trasi linija 160 i 163
alerts.summary: Due to roadworks at the intersection of Obreška and Dragonožečka streets, the Društveni dom bus stops will be temporarily relocated. The stops will be moved to Obreška street no. 124 (towards Lipnica) and Dragonožečka street no. 3 (towards Savski most).

alerts.title: Produženje trase autobusne linije 101
alerts.summary: Bus line 101 (Britanski trg - Gornje Prekrižje) will be extended to Šestine and renamed to 101 (Britanski trg - Šestine). The route will change, and the stop in Ulica Šumski prečac will no longer be served.

alerts.title: Izmjena trasa linija 295, 307 i 308
alerts.summary: Due to reconstruction of Sarajevska cesta, lines 295, 307, and 308 will operate on a modified route. Several stops along Sarajevska cesta will be temporarily out of service.

alerts.title: Linija 107 prometuje skraćenom trasom
alerts.summary: Due to the reconstruction of the Jankomir overpass, bus line 107 will operate a shortened route to the Savska Opatovina roundabout. The Robni terminali Jankomir stop is temporarily closed.

alerts.title: Linija 222 vozi izmijenjenom trasom u smjeru Remetinca
alerts.summary: Due to repairs at Slavonska avenija loop, tram line 222 towards Remetinec will operate a modified route from June 23rd until August 25th. After August 25th, the line will return to its regular route.

alerts.title: Stajalište "Trg Republike Hrvatske" ispred Mimare
alerts.summary: The Trg Republike Hrvatske tram stop in the direction of Savski most has been moved 75 meters south to Rooseveltov trg, in front of the Mimara Museum. Passengers are kindly requested to understand.

alerts.title: Linije 139 i 141 voze obilazno zbog radova
alerts.summary: Bus lines 139 and 141 will operate with a partial route change due to construction at KBC 'Sestre Milosrdnice'. The bus stop Vinogradska 3 will be out of service.
